violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Tomatoes that were prepped 2 hours prior to inspection were placed in plastic containers deeper than 4 inches into the prep unit at 44-55 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC moved tomatoes to sheet pan and into the freezer to rapidly cool. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) Walk-in Freezer maintaining an ambient of 35 degrees Fahrenheit 2) The custard prep unit/cold rail observed maintaining an ambient of 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
